description: Working on DevOps engineering, automation, infrastructure reliability, and enterprise platform operations in a banking environment.

Led backend and DevOps engineering, defined system architecture, built and scaled development teams, optimized APIs and infrastructure, automated CI/CD pipelines, and delivered scalable mobile and web platforms serving over 150,000 daily users.
Founded and developed a sports influencer platform, leading backend, frontend, mobile, DevOps, and product development from idea to MVP and first clients.
Developed internal tools to improve operational efficiency, reduce workflow bottlenecks, and streamline communication between teams using backend, frontend, and CI/CD technologies.
Worked on internal tools for memory design optimization, using TensorFlow and neural networks to improve compiler outputs while developing full-stack applications and CI/CD pipelines.
Worked on VR, AR, and XR projects using Unity3D and Unreal Engine, later transitioning into backend development, DevOps, Kubernetes, infrastructure automation, and scalable product engineering.
